title: Better Console
description: 🎮 A console-inspired Minecraft modpack with clean UI, full controller support, refreshed worldgen, and optimized performance — nostalgia meets Java Edition.
body:
!["Better Console" logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba26c9fab99830207500d3c38af00577204f2fbc.png)

### **Information**
🎮 Better Console – Minecraft like on console, but better
A modpack inspired by console editions of Minecraft. Perfect for players who love simplicity, order, and controller-based gameplay — with a refreshed twist.

🧱 Key Features:
- 📋 **Console-like UI** – clean, readable, inspired by Xbox/PS
- 🎮 **Full controller support** – plug & play ready
- 🌍 **Refreshed worldgen** – new biomes, structures, balance
- ⚙️ **Optimized** – smooth performance and better FPS

  Better Console 🎮 is perfect for players who want to combine the nostalgia of console Minecraft with the possibilities of Java Edition 💎.

**- Better Console includes a modified version of the Classic Aspect texture pack by HecXD43, adapted for Java Edition.
Original creator credit is preserved within the pack’s files.**

[Official Community](https://www.reddit.com/r/Better_Console)
